message.content:
Search the web for the specifications of Hikvision camera model **iDS-2DE2402IX-D3/W/XM**. I need to know:

1. Optical zoom ratio (倍率) — likely 4x based on model number "2402" but confirm
2. Sensor resolution (2MP expected)
3. PTZ capabilities — pan/tilt speed, preset support count
4. Whether it supports 3D positioning (3D定位)
5. IR range
6. Any known limitations

Also search for similar model numbers like "DS-2DE2402" or "iDS-2DE2402IX" if the exact model isn't found. The "2402" in Hikvision naming usually means 2MP + 4x zoom but I want to confirm.

Keep the report concise — just the key specs relevant to building a PTZ face tracking system.

content.text: I'll search for the specifications of this Hikvision camera model.

input.query: 海康威视 iDS-2DE2402IX-D3 参数 规格

Based on the search results, here's what I found about the Hikvision DS-2DE2204IW (the closest match to your query about a 2MP 4x zoom PTZ camera):

## Hikvision DS-2DE2204IW-DE3 — 2MP Mini PTZ Camera

The search results primarily reference the **DS-2DE2204IW-DE3**, which appears to be the model matching your description. Here are the key specifications:

### Resolution & Sensor
- Embedded with a 1/2.8" progressive scan CMOS chip, it supports DWDR and 2.0MP real-time resolution.

### Zoom
- The DS-2DE2204IW supports 4x zoom, Hik-Connect, and PoE & 12VDC power supply.

### Lens
- It features a 2.8-12mm lens.

### Form Factor
- It is a 2MP, 4x optical zoom, IR night vision indoor PTZ Dome IP Camera.

### PTZ & Features
- With pan/tilt, 4x zoom Day/Night IR cut filter, and IR lights, the camera offers more details in indoor environments.

### Smart Features
- The camera also features a wide range of functions, including intrusion detection, line crossing detection, audio exception detection, motion detection, and video tampering detection.

### Use Cases
- It is designed for indoor areas such as cafés, hotels, office lobbies, small shops, etc.

> **Note:** The exact model number **DS-2DE2402IW** did not appear in the search results. The closest match is the **DS-2DE2204IW-DE3**, which is a 2MP, 4x zoom, indoor mini PTZ camera. If you're looking for a different variant, you may want to double-check the model number or consult Hikvision's official product page directly.

Here are the specifications I found for the **Hikvision iDS-2DE2402IX-D3/W/XM(XM)(T5)**:

## Overview

This is a PTZ series 4MP (400万像素) 2.5-inch IR network HD mini PTZ camera. It features 360-degree panoramic auto-rotation, 4MP night vision, mobile phone remote access, two-way audio (voice intercom), memory card slot, and sound & light alarm.

## Key Specifications

### Image & Resolution
- Supports a maximum resolution of **2560 × 1440 @30 fps** HD output.

### Compression
- Supports **H.265** high-efficiency compression algorithm, which can significantly save storage space.

### Zoom
- Supports **2× optical zoom** and **16× digital zoom**.

### Wireless
- The **/W** designation indicates **Wi-Fi** connectivity support.

### Smart Features
- The **iDS** prefix indicates smart/intelligent features built into the camera.

---

## Related Model Specs (DS-2DE2402IW-DE3 series — very similar platform)

Based on the closely related DS-2DE2402IW-DE3 model in the same 2.5" mini PTZ family:

- **Sensor:** 1/2.8" progressive scan CMOS
- **Min. Illumination:** Color: 0.05 Lux @(F2.0, AGC ON), B/W: 0.005 Lux @(F2.0, AGC ON), 0 Lux with IR
- **Video Compression:** Main Stream: H.265+/H.265/H.264+/H.264; Sub-Stream: H.265/H.264/MJPEG; Third Stream: H.265/H.264/MJPEG
- **Scheduled Tasks:** Preset/Pattern Scan/Patrol Scan/Auto Scan/Tilt Scan/Random Scan/Frame Scan/Panorama Scan/Dome Reboot/Dome Adjust/Aux Output
- **Security:** User authentication (ID and PW), Host authentication (MAC address); HTTPS encryption; IP address filtering
- **Protection:** TVS 4000V Lightning Protection, Surge Protection and Voltage Transient Protection
- **Weight:** Approx. 0.65 kg (1.43 lb)

> **Note:** For the full detailed datasheet of the iDS-2DE2402IX-D3/W/XM, you can access the official PDF from [Hikvision's dealer portal](https://dealer-static.hikvision.com/upload/file/doc/DOC000081188-iDS-2DE2402IX-D3_W_XM(XM)(T5).docx.pdf) or from [JD.com product page](https://i-item.jd.com/100064934712.html) for additional details.

以下是海康威视 **iDS-2DE2402IX-D3/W/XM** 的主要参数规格信息：

## 基本信息

该产品为 PTZ系列400万像素2.5寸红外网络高清mini PTZ摄像机。

## 图像传感器与镜头

- 传感器类型：1/2.8″ progressive scan CMOS
- 像素：400万
- 分辨率：2560×1440
- 最低照度：彩色：0.005 Lux @（F1.8，AGC ON）；黑白：0.001 Lux @（F1.8，AGC ON）；0 Lux with IR
- 宽动态：120dB超宽动态
- 焦距：2.8~6 mm，2倍光学变倍
- 视场角：100°~45°（广角~望远）
- 红外照射距离：30 m

## 编码与存储

- 存储编码：H.265
- 支持最大256 GB的MicroSD/MicroSDHC/MicroSDXC卡存储

## 音频与报警

- 内置麦克风，同时支持1路音频输入和1路音频输出
- 内置扬声器（内置功放），可无须外接音频设备实现双向语音对讲
- 内置1路报警输入和1路报警输出，支持报警联动功能
- 报警输出支持设置报警联动预置点/SD卡录像/报警输出/邮件/上传中心/上传FTP/声光报警

## 网络与协议

- 支持Wi-Fi功能
- 软件集成的开放式API，开放型网络视频接口，ISAPI，海康SDK，第三方管理平台接入，GB/T28181协议，ISUP，E家协议，支持萤石接入
- 传输速率支持 802.11b/g/n 标准

## 安全性

- 支持授权的用户名和密码，以及MAC地址绑定，HTTPS加密，IEEE 802.1x网络访问控制

## 智能功能

- 支持3D定位功能，可通过鼠标框选目标以实现目标的快速定位与捕捉
- 支持定时抓图与事件抓图功能
- 支持定时任务、一键守望、一键巡航功能

## 物理规格

- 摄像头类型：球机
- 尺寸：150×150×160mm
- 商品毛重：0.65kg
- 防水等级：无防水等级
- 安装方式：吸顶

## 适用场景

- 适用场合：工厂园区，会议系统，安保系统，学校园区，电梯使用，超市便利店，室内使用
- 支持E家协议和萤石云服务

如需查看完整的官方技术文档，可以访问海康威视经销商平台提供的 [PDF规格书](https://dealer-static.hikvision.com/upload/file/doc/DOC000081188-iDS-2DE2402IX-D3_W_XM(XM)(T5).docx.pdf)。

以下是海康威视 **iDS-2DE2402IX-D3** 系列摄像机关于云台速度、预置点数量和3D定位功能的详细参数：

## 云台速度


- **水平速度**：水平键控速度：0.1°~60°/s，速度可设；水平预置点速度：60°/s
- **垂直速度**：垂直键控速度：0.1°~50°/s，速度可设；垂直预置点速度：50°/s


## 云台旋转范围

支持350°水平旋转，垂直方向0°~90°。

## 预置点数量

支持300个预置位，8条巡航扫描。

## 3D定位功能

支持3D定位功能，可通过鼠标框选目标以实现目标的快速定位与捕捉。

## 其他主要参数

| 参数 | 规格 |
|------|------|
| **传感器** | 1/2.8" progressive scan CMOS |
| **分辨率** | 最大2560 × 1440 @30fps |
| **光学变倍** | 2倍光学变倍，16倍数字变倍 |
| **焦距** | 2.8~6 mm |
| **视场角** | 100°~45°（广角~望远） |
| **红外距离** | 最远可达30 m |
| **宽动态** | 120dB超宽动态 |
| **压缩标准** | H.265, H.264, MJPEG |
| **存储** | 支持最大256 GB的MicroSD/MicroSDHC/MicroSDXC卡存储 |

该摄像机属于海康威视PTZ系列400万像素2.5寸红外网络高清mini PTZ摄像机，还支持区域人脸抓拍、入侵侦测、越界侦测、移动侦测等智能侦测功能，以及断网续传、联动声光报警、定时任务、一键守望、一键巡航等功能。

Here are the search results for your query about **Hikvision iDS-2DE2402IX PTZ pan tilt speed preset number ISAPI**:

## Key Findings

### ISAPI PTZ Control Endpoints

The Hikvision ISAPI protocol provides several endpoints for PTZ control:

1. **Going to a Preset:**
   To activate a preset, you need to go to: `http://<IP>/ISAPI/PTZCtrl/channels/1/presets/1/goto`. Hikvision requires you to use the HTTP PUT request method, not simple GET requests.

2. **Continuous Pan/Tilt Movement:**
   The URL is `/ISAPI/PTZCtrl/channels/1/continuous` with an XML file like: `<PTZData><pan>-100</pan><tilt>0</tilt></PTZData>` (for moving to the left).

3. **Momentary Movement:**
   For momentary movements, the command is `ISAPI/PTZCtrl/channels/$ChannelID/momentary`, and for continuous movement, `ISAPI/PTZCtrl/channels/$ChannelID/continuous`. The XML structure uses `<PTZData><pan>$x</pan><tilt>$y</tilt><zoom>$z</zoom></PTZData>`.

### Pan/Tilt Speed Control

Users have found solutions to move PTZ Hikvision cameras from preset to preset, but controlling the pan speed (e.g., slow speed) has been a challenge.

Movement speeds are calculated using parameters like `panspeed`, `tiltspeed`, and `speed` (for zoom), and are multiplied by the direction value in the XML payload.

### Preset Configuration

Up to 256 presets can be added. The preset number should be between 1 and 256.

A preset is a predefined image position which contains information of pan, tilt, etc.

### Using cURL for Control

The curl command format is: `curl -X PUT -T TEST_PTZ.xml http://login:password@ip/PTZCtrl/channels/1/Continuous`

### Node-RED / Home Assistant Integration

The method used is HTTP PUT from the Hikvision ISAPI. You need to provide: IP, Port (usually 80), Password, User, Channel (1 for PTZ, for NVR depending on channel), and Preset (the preset number you want to call).

### Official ISAPI Documentation

The official PTZ Service Specification for Hikvision's ISAPI protocol details the functions and capabilities of PTZ control, including a glossary of terms, descriptions of various PTZ control commands, and the structure of XML data used for configuration and control. This document is available on [Scribd](https://www.scribd.com/document/834366266/Hikvision-Isapi-2-0-Ptz-Service) and may be the most comprehensive reference for the iDS-2DE2402IX or similar PTZ models.

---

**Note:** The search did not return results specifically for the **iDS-2DE2402IX** model, but the ISAPI PTZ commands are standardized across Hikvision PTZ cameras. The same endpoints and XML structures should apply to this model.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

content.text:
Here is the consolidated spec report for the **Hikvision iDS-2DE2402IX-D3/W/XM**.

---

## Key Correction: Model Naming

The "2402" in this model does **NOT** mean 2MP + 4x zoom. This camera is actually **4MP (400万) with 2x optical zoom**. The Hikvision naming convention for this sub-series is different from what you expected.

---

## Confirmed Specifications

### Sensor & Resolution
- **Sensor:** 1/2.8" progressive scan CMOS
- **Resolution:** 4MP -- max 2560 x 1440 @ 30fps
- **WDR:** 120dB true WDR
- **Min illumination:** Color 0.005 Lux (F1.8, AGC ON), B/W 0.001 Lux, 0 Lux with IR

### Lens & Zoom
- **Optical zoom:** 2x (NOT 4x) -- focal length 2.8-6mm
- **Digital zoom:** 16x
- **Field of view:** 100 degrees (wide) to 45 degrees (tele)

### PTZ Capabilities
- **Pan range:** 350 degrees
- **Tilt range:** 0-90 degrees
- **Pan speed (manual):** 0.1-60 deg/s (configurable)
- **Pan speed (preset):** 60 deg/s
- **Tilt speed (manual):** 0.1-50 deg/s (configurable)
- **Tilt speed (preset):** 50 deg/s
- **Presets:** 300 presets supported
- **Patrol routes:** 8 cruise scans

### 3D Positioning
- **Yes, supported.** Mouse-click box-select to zoom/position on a target for quick location and capture (3D定位).

### IR Range
- **30 meters** max IR distance

### Smart Features (iDS prefix)
- Face capture in designated area (区域人脸抓拍)
- Intrusion detection, line crossing detection, motion detection
- Sound and light alarm linkage (声光报警)
- Scheduled tasks, one-key guard position, one-key patrol

### Connectivity
- Wi-Fi (802.11 b/g/n) -- the "/W" suffix
- MicroSD up to 256GB
- Two-way audio (built-in mic + speaker)
- ISAPI, ONVIF, GB/T28181, Hik-Connect/EZVIZ

### Physical
- Form factor: 2.5-inch mini PTZ dome
- Size: 150 x 150 x 160mm
- Weight: ~0.65 kg
- Mount: Ceiling (吸顶)
- **No weather rating** -- indoor use only

---

## Limitations Relevant to Face Tracking

1. **Only 2x optical zoom** -- very limited zoom range (2.8-6mm). For face tracking at distance this is a significant constraint; you will need the subject relatively close (a few meters) for a useful face crop.
2. **350-degree pan, not 360** -- there is a 10-degree dead zone in horizontal rotation.
3. **Tilt only 0-90 degrees** -- ceiling mount only, no wall mount inversion capability.
4. **Indoor only** -- no IP rating for weather protection.
5. **Pan preset speed 60 deg/s, tilt 50 deg/s** -- decent for indoor tracking but not the fastest PTZ on the market. For a face tracking application, the manual speed range (0.1-60 deg/s) via ISAPI continuous move commands gives you fine-grained proportional control which is exactly what you need.
6. **4MP not 2MP** -- this is actually better than expected for face tracking (more pixels for detection at wider angles), but processing 2560x1440 frames in real-time requires more compute than 1080p.

---

Sources:
- [Official Hikvision Datasheet PDF (iDS-2DE2402IX-D3/W/XM)](https://dealer-static.hikvision.com/upload/file/doc/DOC000081188-iDS-2DE2402IX-D3_W_XM(XM)(T5).docx.pdf)
- [hhikvision.com product page](https://www.hhikvision.com/chanpin/2122.html)
- [afzhan.com product listing](https://m.afzhan.com/st166766/product_13484058.html)
- [JD.com product page](https://i-item.jd.com/100064934712.html)
- [bjharc.com product page](http://www.bjharc.com/products/ds2de2.html)
- [Hikvision ISAPI PTZ documentation on Scribd](https://www.scribd.com/document/834366266/Hikvision-Isapi-2-0-Ptz-Service)
